functionalities:
- Platform only displays jobs from companies with active UK visa sponsorship licences
  ***acceptance tests***
  - Jobs from non-sponsored companies are filtered out at load time.
  - A green "Sponsorship: Active" pill is shown on sponsored jobs.

- User profile is displayed in the sidebar
  ***acceptance tests***
  - Shows avatar with initials "AA", name and email.
  - Pro upgrade promo card is visible at the bottom of the sidebar.
